ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller */,
  "mc_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller */,
  "mc_type" TEXT /* Type of the microcontroller */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the microcontroller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "default_clock_speed" REAL /* Default clock speed of the microcontroller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Description of the parameter's characteristic */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowable value for the parameter */,
  "typ" TEXT /* Parameter type or specification */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowable value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions related to the parameter (if applicable) */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller associated with the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_access_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., environmental, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller associated with the parameter set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_set_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set member */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter set */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_set_members_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES parameter_sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_set_members_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., parameter usage, version history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)
